title: ColdCase
description: A Queens DA cold case — chiefly the office's unidentified/identified human-remains initiative (WordPress categories cold-cases 67, unidentified 19, identified 47). This is the ONE genuinely structured dataset trapped in prose: each post encodes a NamUs case number, an age range, a sex, a date and location found. The schema recovers that structure so a family, journalist, or agent can query it — a task impossible against the current HTML.

status.description: Whether the individual has since been identified (WordPress 'identified'/'unidentified' category).

namusId.description: NamUs case number parsed from the title (e.g. 'UP13060'). Joins to namus.gov.

dateFound.description: Date remains/person found or last seen.

description.description: Narrative details from the post body.
